## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] The code builds locally without errors.
- [ ] I have followed the project's architectural patterns (Clean Architecture).
- [ ] I have added/updated unit tests (if applicable).
- [ ] The user interface was verified in both Light and Dark Modes.
- [ ] There are no critical compiler warnings.
